notes: hallucination_source=auto uses the final-answer detector for fair cross-backend generation-rate comparisons; temporal skeptic values are still written per row.

qa_quality.notes: This fixed-context QReCC adapter supports conversational QA quality metrics. Native QReCC retrieval/rewrite metrics require rewrite targets and retrieval ids, which are not present in this adapted JSONL.

retrieval_proxy.notes: This is a fixed-context source-hit proxy using preserved gold evidence ids. It is not native QReCC retrieval ranking evaluation such as Recall@k or MRR.

hallucination_detection.notes: Response-level precision/recall/F1 requires gold hallucination labels. This adapted QReCC file does not include gold hallucination annotations, so only generation hallucination rate is reported.
